Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.common

Record Class Donation

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.common.Donation
Record Components:
platform - non-null platform where the donation event was generated
type - non-null donation category
status - non-null normalized donation status (DonationStatus)
userId - nullable donor identifier in the source platform
nickname - non-null donor nickname
message - non-null donation message text
anonymous - whether the donor was anonymous in the source platform
parsedAmount - non-null normalized amount and currency data (CurrencyUtils.ParsedAmount)
raw - nullable raw platform event object for advanced casting and access
public record Donation(@NotNull DonationPlatform platform, @NotNull DonationType type, @NotNull DonationStatus status, @Nullable String userId, @NotNull String nickname, @NotNull String message, boolean anonymous, CurrencyUtils.ParsedAmount parsedAmount, @Nullable Object raw) extends Record
Normalized donation payload shared across all supported platforms.
Since:
1.0.0

    Creates an instance of a Donation record class.

  • Constructor Details

    • Donation

      public Donation(@NotNull @NotNull DonationPlatform platform, @NotNull @NotNull DonationType type, @NotNull @NotNull DonationStatus status, @Nullable @Nullable String userId, @NotNull @NotNull String nickname, @NotNull @NotNull String message, boolean anonymous, @NotNull CurrencyUtils.ParsedAmount parsedAmount, @Nullable @Nullable Object raw)
      Creates an instance of a Donation record class.
      Parameters:
      platform - the value for the platform record component
      type - the value for the type record component
      status - the value for the status record component
      userId - the value for the userId record component
      nickname - the value for the nickname record component
      message - the value for the message record component
      anonymous - the value for the anonymous record component
      parsedAmount - the value for the parsedAmount record component
      raw - the value for the raw record component

  • Method Details

    • amount

      public int amount()
      Returns the numeric donation amount as an integer.
      Returns:
      parsed amount, or 0 when parsing fails

    • currencyCode

      public String currencyCode()
      Returns the normalized currency code.
      Returns:
      currency code from parsedAmount()

    • amountInKRW

      public int amountInKRW()
      Converts the donation amount to KRW when conversion is supported.
      Returns:
      converted KRW amount, or 0 when unavailable

    • formattedAmount

      public String formattedAmount()
      Returns a formatted amount string for display.
      Returns:
      formatted amount text

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
